lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਧਿਆਈ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar paarabraham dhiaaee sadaa sadaa gun gaaeaa |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, I meditate on the Supreme Lord God; I sing His Glorious Praises forever and ever.
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਰੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak mere poore manorath paarabraham gur paaeaa |4|4|
lines.english: Says Nanak, my desires have been fulfilled; I have found my Guru, the Supreme Lord God. ||4||4||
Meditating in rememberance on the Naam, all my sins have been erased.
The Guru has blessed me with the Capital of the True Name.
God's servants are embellished and exalted in His Court;
serving Him, they look beauteous forever. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੇ ਰੋਗ ਦੋਖ ਸਭਿ ਬਿਨਸਹਿ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sagale rog dokh sabh binaseh agiaan andheraa man te jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: All sickness and sin shall be erased; your mind shall be rid of the darkness of ignorance. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japahu mere bhaaee |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, O my Siblings of Destiny.
The Guru has saved me from death and rebirth, O friend;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਗੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: har ke naam siau laagee preet |
lines.english: I am in love with the Name of the Lord.
The suffering of millions of incarnations is gone;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tis gur kau hau sad bal jaaee |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to the Guru;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਭਲ ਹੋਸ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai so bhal hos |2|
lines.english: whatever pleases Him is good. ||2||
by His Grace, I meditate on the Lord's Name.
meeting Him, one is lovingly attuned to the Lord. ||3||
By great good fortune, such a Guru is found;
Please be merciful, O Supreme Lord God, O Lord and Master,
Inner-knower, Searcher of Hearts.
Servant Nanak has come to the Sanctuary of God. ||4||5||
Twenty-four hours a day, I am lovingly attuned to You.
In His Mercy, God has made me His Own.
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:
Twenty-four hours a day, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਨ ਕਉ ਦੀਏ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam japan kau dee |
lines.english: He has blessed me with the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਹੈ ਸੋਈ ਭਲ ਮੀਠਾ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਤਿਆਗਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo gur kahai soee bhal meetthaa man kee mat tiaag |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever the Guru says is good and sweet to me. I have renounced the intellectual wisdom of my mind. ||1||Pause||
I have been saved, touching the Feet of the True Guru.
Fear is dispelled, and all anxiety has been alleviated. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕਲੇਸ ਕਿਛੁ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: kal kales kichh bighan na hoee |
lines.english: There are no conflicts, pains or obstacles.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: man tan vasiaa har prabh soee |
lines.english: That Lord God abides within my mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜੀਅ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa prabh jeea kai sang |
lines.english: Forever and ever, God is with my soul.
I am in love with the Lotus Feet of the Lord;
Filth and pollution are washed away by the Love of the Name. ||2||
I am no longer consumed by sexual desire, anger and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਾਂ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bhaae bhagat har siau man maanaan |3|
lines.english: Through loving devotional worship, my mind is pleased and appeased with the Lord. ||3||
Now, I know the way to meet God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਗਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa prabh gun nidh gaaeeai |
lines.english: Forever and ever, sing the Glories of God, the Treasure of Virtue.
Listen, O friends, Saints, my exalted companions.
The Jewel of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is unfathomable and immeasurable.
They are wealthy, and they are the true merchants,
Says Nanak, by great good fortune, He is found. ||4||6||
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਮਨ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japahu man meet |
lines.english: So chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, in your mind, my friends.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਪੂਰਨ ਰੀਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa paaeeai vaddabhaagee niramal pooran reet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru is found by great good fortune, and then one's lifestyle becomes perfect and immaculate. ||1||Pause||
who have the credit of the Naam in the Court of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sant prasaad har ke gun gaaee |2|
lines.english: by the Grace of the Saints, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||2||
They earn the profit, and the congratulations pour in;
Their lives are fruitful and prosperous, and their birth is approved;
by Guru's Grace, they enjoy the Love of the Lord. ||3||
Sexuality, anger and egotism are wiped away;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪੂਰੀ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa pooree taa kee kalaa |
lines.english: The Guru is Perfect, and Perfect is His Power.
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:
O Nanak, as Gurmukh, they are carried across to the other shore. ||4||7||
